expectations.text: Should describe exponential backoff schedule: [0, 2, 4, 8] seconds (4 attempts total)
Should specify per-remote upper bound = 4 * 5s timeout + 14s sleep = 34 seconds
Should implement in Python (not Bash) for reliable subprocess.run(timeout=...) and JSON handling
Should early-exit when match=true, not wait full schedule
Should return match=false after all attempts exhausted without throwing exception
Should classify errors: TimeoutExpired → network_timeout, exit 128 → auth_failed, OSError → error
